Step: Tap the search bar or "Points of Interest" button on the Navigation screen
Expected Result: A POI search interface or category list is displayed

Step: Type "Gas Station" in the search field or select the "Gas Station" POI category
Expected Result: Gas station search is initiated or the category filter is applied

Step: Tap "Search" or press Enter to execute the search
Expected Result: A list of nearby gas station results is displayed

Step: Verify at least one gas station result is shown in the results list
Expected Result: One or more gas station entries appear with name and distance information

Step: Tap the first gas station result to view its details
Expected Result: A detail view shows the gas station name and address and a map pin

Step: Tap "Set as Destination" or "Go" to start navigation to the gas station
Expected Result: Route guidance begins with a route calculated to the selected gas station

Step: Verify route guidance has started with turn-by-turn directions
Expected Result: Guidance banner shows the next maneuver and estimated arrival time
Route guidance ends and the map returns to free-browse mode
